acceptanceReviewed.criterion: A deterministic Swift or XCTest probe records kCMVideoCodecType_AV1 / av01 VideoToolbox hardware decode support, or the exact unsupported condition.
Mac environment, Xcode, Swift, and command evidence are saved under evidence/m3-videotoolbox-capability-probe.
The probe runs under the macOS check path or is directly documented with command evidence.
m3-videotoolbox-decode-sample remains responsible for actual encoded sample decode after M2 provides or checks in a valid frame.
